_note: Prompts only. Assertions live in assertions.json so the agent under test never reads the answer key.

evals.name: four-phase-recipe
evals.prompt: I want to run real-time decoding on a 3-qubit repetition code in simulation. What are the steps from DEM to in-kernel correction?

evals.name: configure-before-run
evals.prompt: I called cudaq.run first and then qec.configure_decoders_from_file('config.yaml'). The decoder returns all zeros. Why?

evals.name: block-syndrome-size
evals.prompt: What should I set for decoder_config.block_size and decoder_config.syndrome_size given a DEM with detector_error_matrix of shape (60, 200)?

evals.name: d-sparse-rounds
evals.prompt: How do I compute the value to pass into generate_timelike_sparse_detector_matrix? My memory experiment uses num_rounds=10.

evals.name: realtime-eligible-decoders
evals.prompt: Can I use tensor_network_decoder for in-kernel real-time decoding?

evals.name: in-kernel-api-location
evals.prompt: I cannot find reset_decoder in cudaq_qec.__init__.py. Where is it defined and how do I call it?

evals.name: finalize-decoders
evals.prompt: My second cudaq.run in the same Python process fails with a strange GPU resource error. The first run worked fine. What did I forget?

evals.name: decoder-id-mismatch
evals.prompt: I have two logical qubits in my circuit and my corrections are getting applied to the wrong one. What controls the routing?

evals.name: sliding-window-pcm-sorted
evals.prompt: qec.get_decoder('sliding_window', H, ...) errors with something about PCM sort order. H came from my own construction, not from a DEM. What now?

evals.name: quantinuum-emulator-first
evals.prompt: I want to deploy real-time decoding on Quantinuum Helios hardware. What should I run before submitting to the actual machine?

evals.name: autonomous-decoder-context
evals.prompt: I want to write a GPU-resident decoder that runs entirely on the device with no CPU involvement. What's the base class and what file do I read first?

evals.name: predecoder-pipeline-d-T
evals.prompt: Which surface code distance / round count combinations does the hybrid AI predecoder + PyMatching pipeline ship with out of the box?

evals.name: debug-decoder-logging
evals.prompt: I'm submitting real-time decoding to Quantinuum and the corrections look wrong. How do I see what the host is uploading to the decoder?

activation.prompt: Set up in-kernel decoding on a surface code
Deploy a decoder to Quantinuum Helios
Train an MLP decoder on Stim data
Compute H2 ground state with VQE
Wire the hybrid predecoder + MWPM pipeline
Add a new pybind11 decoder plugin
